title: Stellar feedback SPICEs up [C II] emission in the first galaxies
summary: The bright [C II] 158 $μ$m line is a key tracer of star-forming gas and feedback-driven outflows in high-redshift galaxies. Using the {\tt SPICE} simulations, we quantify how variations in stellar feedback (bursty versus continuous energy injection) shape properties of $z \gtrsim 5$ galaxies traced by [C II] emission. All models show a tight correlation between [C II] luminosity ($L_{\rm [CII]}$) and star formation rate, but bursty feedback produces systematically lower $L_{\rm [CII]}$ at fixed star formation rate and larger intrinsic scatter. The [C II]-emitting region is typically more extended than the rest-frame UV continuum by factors of $\approx 2-4$, consistent with ALMA observations at $z>5$. Outflowing gas is ubiquitous, with mass outflow rates scaling with $L_{\rm [CII]}$ and reaching $\sim 10,M_\odot,{\rm yr^{-1}}$, yet net mass flux remains inflow-dominated in [C II]-bright galaxies, even with bursty feedback. We find that outflow velocities inferred from [C II] line profiles overestimate true cold gas outflow velocities by factors of 2--3 while underestimating net gas outflow velocities by factors of 2--5, indicating that [C II] is a biased tracer of gas flows. Although outflows are present in all models, the fastest gas is not [C II]-bright; the brightest high-velocity [C II] emission can be explained by gravitational motion. While [C II] spatial and spectral properties alone do not clearly distinguish feedback models, gas kinematics provides a strong diagnostic: predicted $V/σ$ ratios show that smooth feedback enables earlier disk settling in massive galaxies, whereas bursty feedback delays disk formation, yielding a higher disk fraction ($\approx 48%$ vs.\ $\approx 28%$) at $z=5$. Overall, [C II] reliably traces star formation but, when used alone, misrepresents gas kinematics, underscoring the need for multiwavelength (ALMA+JWST) diagnostics.

AI.tldr: 通过SPICE模拟研究恒星反馈机制（突发vs连续）对高红移星系[C II]发射特性的影响，发现[C II]能可靠示踪恒星形成率，但单独使用时对气体运动学的表征存在偏差。

AI.method: 使用SPICE模拟，比较突发性反馈和连续性反馈两种模型，分析它们对z≳5星系[C II]发射特性的影响，包括光度-恒星形成率关系、空间分布、外流特性、气体运动学和星系结构形成。

AI.conclusion: [C II]能可靠示踪恒星形成，但单独使用时对气体运动学的表征存在偏差，需要结合多波长（ALMA+JWST）诊断来准确理解高红移星系的反馈机制和结构形成。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 明亮的 [C II] 158 $\mu$m 谱线是高红移星系中恒星形成气体和反馈驱动外流的关键示踪剂。利用 {\tt SPICE} 模拟，我们量化了恒星反馈变化（爆发式与连续能量注入）如何塑造由 [C II] 发射示踪的 $z \gtrsim 5$ 星系的特性。所有模型均显示 [C II] 光度 ($L_{\rm [CII]}$) 与恒星形成率之间存在紧密相关性，但爆发式反馈在固定恒星形成率下产生系统性较低的 $L_{\rm [CII]}$ 和更大的内禀弥散。[C II] 发射区域通常比静止系紫外连续谱延伸约 $\approx 2-4$ 倍，这与 $z>5$ 的 ALMA 观测一致。外流气体普遍存在，质量外流率与 $L_{\rm [CII]}$ 成比例并达到 $\sim 10\,M_\odot\,{\rm yr^{-1}}$，然而即使在爆发式反馈下，[C II] 亮星系中的净质量流仍以流入为主。我们发现，从 [C II] 谱线轮廓推断的外流速度高估了真实冷气体外流速度 2-3 倍，同时低估了净气体外流速度 2-5 倍，表明 [C II] 是气体流动的有偏示踪剂。尽管所有模型中都存在外流，但最快的气体并非 [C II] 亮；最亮的高速度 [C II] 发射可由引力运动解释。虽然 [C II] 的空间和光谱特性本身不能清晰区分反馈模型，但气体运动学提供了强有力的诊断：预测的 $V/σ$ 比值表明，平滑反馈使得大质量星系中更早出现盘沉降，而爆发式反馈延迟了盘形成，在 $z=5$ 时产生更高的盘比例（约 $48\%$ 对比约 $28\%$）。总体而言，[C II] 可靠地示踪恒星形成，但单独使用时曲解了气体运动学，强调了多波段（ALMA+JWST）诊断的必要性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：[C II]能可靠示踪恒星形成，但单独使用时对气体运动学的表征存在偏差，需要结合多波长（ALMA+JWST）诊断来准确理解高红移星系的反馈机制和结构形成。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: JWST composite images in F150 (b), F277W (g) and F444W (r) overlaid with [C II] line emission contours assuming a 0.3 ′′ beam (pink contours) for SPICE galaxies at \(z=5-7\) for the three feedback models. [C II] contours indicate [2,5,10,20,50,100] \(\sigma\) contours assuming a noise of 0.1 mJy. Extended [C II] emission is seen ubiquitously in all models with [C II] extending far beyond the UV component of the galaxies. Insets show normalized [C II] spectra extracted within the effective radius of [C II] for each galaxy, and the numbers listed highlight the peak flux of each spectrum. We see a strong diversity in morphologies (of UV and [C II]) and spectra of [C II] emitters. The middle enlarged panels show the exact same halo in smooth-sn (left) and bursty-sn (right) at \(z=5\) , highlighting two distinct mechanisms to produce broad wings in [C II] spectra of galaxies. Galaxy in smooth-sn produces a symmetric broad wing due to the presence of a rotating bulge, while in bursty-sn this is due to the presence of an outflowing region. This highlights the diverse nature of kinematics traced by [C II] in the first galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在F150 (b)、F277W (g) 和 F444W (r) 波段的JWST合成图像上叠加了假设0.3 ′′波束的 [C II] 谱线发射等高线（粉色等高线），展示了三种反馈模型下SPICE星系在 \(z=5-7\) 的情况。[C II] 等高线表示假设噪声为0.1 mJy时的 [2,5,10,20,50,100] \(\sigma\) 等高线。在所有模型中普遍可见延展的 [C II] 发射，[C II] 远远超出星系的紫外成分。插图显示了在每个星系的 [C II] 有效半径内提取的归一化 [C II] 光谱，列出的数字突出了每个光谱的峰值流量。我们看到了 [C II] 发射体的形态（紫外和 [C II]）和光谱的强烈多样性。中间放大的面板显示了在 \(z=5\) 时完全相同的暗晕在smooth-sn（左）和bursty-sn（右）中的情况，突出了在星系 [C II] 光谱中产生宽翼的两种不同机制。smooth-sn中的星系由于存在旋转核球而产生对称的宽翼，而在bursty-sn中则是由于存在外流区域。这突出了在第一批星系中由 [C II] 示踪的运动学的多样性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Luminosity of the [C II] line ( \(L_{[CII]}\) ) as a function of the SFR calculated over 10 Myr of lookback time for SPICE galaxies at \(z=10\) (left panel), \(z=7\) (middle panel) and \(z=5\) (right panel) for bursty-sn (red), smooth-sn (blue) and hyper-sn (turquoise), respectively. While smooth-sn and hyper-sn exhibit a clear linear trend, bursty-sn shows a relative suppression in luminosity at \(SFR>1M_{\odot}yr^{-1}\) . Yellow stars show ALMA observations of [C II] emitters in redshift bins of 0.5 around the redshift of each panel (see text). Black and grey lines represent best fits from observations of [C II] emitters at \(z\sim\) 0 (De Looze et al., 2014 ) and \(z\sim 5-7\) (Schaerer et al., 2020 ) . Shaded regions enclose 16th and 84th percentiles. Yellow stars show data from various ALMA surveys and serendipitous observations (Capak et al., 2015 ; Finkelstein et al., 2013 ; Ota et al., 2014 ; Schaerer et al., 2015 ; Maiolino et al., 2015 ; Pentericci et al., 2016 ; Knudsen et al., 2016 ; Laporte et al., 2019 ; Bradač et al., 2017 ; Smit et al., 2018 ; Matthee et al., 2019 ; Bakx et al., 2020 ; Fudamoto et al., 2022 ; Molyneux et al., 2022 ; Schouws et al., 2023 ; Heintz et al., 2023 ; Fudamoto et al., 2023 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：对于SPICE星系在 \(z=10\) （左面板）、\(z=7\) （中面板）和 \(z=5\) （右面板）下，[C II] 谱线光度 ( \(L_{[CII]}\) ) 作为回溯时间10 Myr内计算的SFR的函数，分别对应bursty-sn（红色）、smooth-sn（蓝色）和hyper-sn（蓝绿色）。虽然smooth-sn和hyper-sn表现出清晰的线性趋势，但bursty-sn在 \(SFR>1M_{\odot}yr^{-1}\) 时显示出光度的相对抑制。黄色星号显示了在每个面板红移周围0.5红移区间内的 [C II] 发射体的ALMA观测（见正文）。黑色和灰色线分别代表来自 \(z\sim\) 0 (De Looze et al., 2014 ) 和 \(z\sim 5-7\) (Schaerer et al., 2020 ) 的 [C II] 发射体观测的最佳拟合。阴影区域包围了第16和第84百分位数。黄色星号显示了来自各种ALMA巡天和偶然观测的数据 (Capak et al., 2015 ; Finkelstein et al., 2013 ; Ota et al., 2014 ; Schaerer et al., 2015 ; Maiolino et al., 2015 ; Pentericci et al., 2016 ; Knudsen et al., 2016 ; Laporte et al., 2019 ; Bradač et al., 2017 ; Smit et al., 2018 ; Matthee et al., 2019 ; Bakx et al., 2020 ; Fudamoto et al., 2022 ; Molyneux et al., 2022 ; Schouws et al., 2023 ; Heintz et al., 2023 ; Fudamoto et al., 2023 ) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Median volume filling fraction of HI within the effective radius of [C II] emission (see section 3.3 ) as a function of the [C II] luminosity for SPICE galaxies at \(z=10\) (top panel), \(z=7\) (middle panel) and \(z=5\) (bottom panel) for bursty-sn (red), smooth-sn (blue) and hyper-sn (turquoise). Shaded regions enclose 16th and 84th percentiles.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：对于SPICE星系在 \(z=10\) （顶部面板）、\(z=7\) （中间面板）和 \(z=5\) （底部面板）下，[C II] 发射有效半径内HI的中值体积填充因子作为 [C II] 光度的函数，分别对应bursty-sn（红色）、smooth-sn（蓝色）和hyper-sn（蓝绿色）。阴影区域包围了第16和第84百分位数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Median mass-to-light ratio \(M_{HI}/L_{[CII]}\) as a function of the metallicity of SPICE galaxies at \(z=5-10\) for bursty-sn (red), smooth-sn (blue) and hyper-sn (turquoise). Shaded regions enclose 16th and 84th percentiles. Yellow data points represent measurements form Heintz et al. ( 2021 ) and Sulzenauer et al. ( 2025 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：对于SPICE星系在 \(z=5-10\) 下，中值质光比 \(M_{HI}/L_{[CII]}\) 作为金属丰度的函数，分别对应bursty-sn（红色）、smooth-sn（蓝色）和hyper-sn（蓝绿色）。阴影区域包围了第16和第84百分位数。黄色数据点代表来自Heintz et al. ( 2021 ) 和 Sulzenauer et al. ( 2025 ) 的测量值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Top: Median [C II] effective radius as a function of the [C II] luminosity for SPICE galaxies at \(z=10-5\) for bursty-sn (red), smooth-sn (blue) and hyper-sn (turquoise). Bottom: Median ratio of effective radius of [C II] to UV continuum at 1500 Å as a function of [C II] luminosity ( \(L_{[CII]}\) ) for SPICE galaxies at \(z=10-5\) for bursty-sn (red), smooth-sn (blue) and hyper-sn (turquoise). Shaded regions enclose 16th and 84th percentiles. Yellow stars show size estimates taken from various large ALMA programs (Fujimoto et al., 2020 ; Fudamoto et al., 2022 ; Ikeda et al., 2024 ; Rowland et al., 2024 ; Bouwens et al., 2022 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：顶部：对于SPICE星系在 \(z=10-5\) 下，中值 [C II] 有效半径作为 [C II] 光度的函数，分别对应bursty-sn（红色）、smooth-sn（蓝色）和hyper-sn（蓝绿色）。底部：对于SPICE星系在 \(z=10-5\) 下，[C II] 与1500 Å处紫外连续谱的有效半径之比的中值作为 [C II] 光度 ( \(L_{[CII]}\) ) 的函数，分别对应bursty-sn（红色）、smooth-sn（蓝色）和hyper-sn（蓝绿色）。阴影区域包围了第16和第84百分位数。黄色星号显示了来自各种大型ALMA项目的尺寸估计 (Fujimoto et al., 2020 ; Fudamoto et al., 2022 ; Ikeda et al., 2024 ; Rowland et al., 2024 ; Bouwens et al., 2022 ) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Top: Area of [CII] emission enclosed within the \(2\sigma\) contour as a function of the [C II] luminosity for bursty-sn (red), smooth-sn (blue) and hyper-sn (turquoise) at \(z=10-5\) . Solid lines show medians for the respective models while the scatter includes galaxies from all three models. Each scatter point is also color coded with the Gini index estimated for the emission. Datapoints show size estimates for [C II] emitting regions in the SPT2349-56 protocluster from Sulzenauer et al. 2025 . Bottom: Ratio of area of [C II] emission to the area of the halo as a function of [C II] luminosity for bursty-sn (red), smooth-sn (blue) and hyper-sn (turquoise). Shaded regions enclose 16th and 84th percentiles.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：顶部：对于bursty-sn（红色）、smooth-sn（蓝色）和hyper-sn（蓝绿色）在 \(z=10-5\) 下，[CII] 发射在 \(2\sigma\) 等高线内包围的面积作为 [C II] 光度的函数。实线显示了各自模型的中值，而散点包括了所有三个模型的星系。每个散点还根据发射的基尼指数进行了颜色编码。数据点显示了来自Sulzenauer et al. 2025的SPT2349-56原星系团中 [C II] 发射区域的尺寸估计。底部：对于bursty-sn（红色）、smooth-sn（蓝色）和hyper-sn（蓝绿色），[C II] 发射面积与暗晕面积之比作为 [C II] 光度的函数。阴影区域包围了第16和第84百分位数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Median radial velocity distributions of gas in halos hosting galaxies with \(M_{*}>10^{8}\,{M_{\odot}}\) . The black curve shows the median distribution computed over all gas cells, combining all feedback models, with the shaded region indicating the \(16\) – \(84\) percentile range. The purple curve corresponds to [C II]-bright gas ( \(L_{[CII]}>0.01\,{L_{\odot}}\) ). Colored solid (dashed) curves show the distributions for all gas cells ([C II] bright) for individual feedback models. \(v_{rad}>0\) denotes outflowing gas and \(v_{rad}<0\) denotes inflowing gas. Vertical dashed purple and black lines represent the \(90^{th}\) percentiles of the distributions.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：在拥有 \(M_{*}>10^{8}\,{M_{\odot}}\) 星系的暗晕中气体的中值径向速度分布。黑色曲线显示了结合所有反馈模型，对所有气体单元计算的中值分布，阴影区域表示 \(16\) – \(84\) 百分位数范围。紫色曲线对应 [C II] 亮气体 ( \(L_{[CII]}>0.01\,{L_{\odot}}\) )。彩色实线（虚线）曲线显示了各个反馈模型对所有气体单元（[C II] 亮）的分布。\(v_{rad}>0\) 表示外流气体，\(v_{rad}<0\) 表示内流气体。垂直的紫色和黑色虚线分别代表分布的第 \(90^{th}\) 百分位数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Top: Median mass outflow rates for the three feedback models as a function of the [C II] luminosity, \(L_{{[CII]}}\) . Shaded regions denote the 16th and 84th percentiles. bursty-sn transitions from net inflow to net outflow at high \(L_{[CII]}\) , driving the strongest outflows, whereas smooth-sn and hyper-sn demonstrate lower outflow efficiencies with increasing luminosities. Bottom: Median net mass flow rate, \(\dot{M}_{{net}}\) , as a function of [C II] luminosity, \(L_{{[CII]}}\) , for the bursty-sn (red), smooth-sn (blue), and hyper-sn (turquoise) feedback models. Shaded regions denote the 16th and 84th percentiles. The histograms display the distributions of \(\dot{M}_{{net}}\) for each model for galaxies with \(L_{[CII]}>10^{7}L_{\odot}\) . Numbers listed indicate fraction of galaxies that are outflow dominated at different luminosity cuts.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：顶部：三种反馈模型的中值质量外流率作为 [C II] 光度 \(L_{{[CII]}}\) 的函数。阴影区域表示第16和第84百分位数。bursty-sn在高 \(L_{[CII]}\) 下从净流入转变为净流出，驱动了最强的外流，而smooth-sn和hyper-sn随着光度增加表现出较低的外流效率。底部：对于bursty-sn（红色）、smooth-sn（蓝色）和hyper-sn（蓝绿色）反馈模型，中值净质量流率 \(\dot{M}_{{net}}\) 作为 [C II] 光度 \(L_{{[CII]}}\) 的函数。阴影区域表示第16和第84百分位数。直方图显示了对于 \(L_{[CII]}>10^{7}L_{\odot}\) 的星系，每个模型的 \(\dot{M}_{{net}}\) 分布。列出的数字表示在不同光度截断下外流主导的星系比例。

title: Other red dots: A possible GLIMPSE of normal AGB stars at Cosmic Noon through extreme lensing
summary: We report the discovery of four extremely faint ($m_{\mathrm{F444W}}\gtrsim29$) red point sources in recent ultra-deep JWST/NIRCam images of the strong lensing galaxy cluster Abell S1063. All four sources sit in lensed arcs, on the symmetry points very close to the critical curves for their host-galaxies' redshifts ($z\sim1-4$). Remarkably, these point sources appear in most arcs that are sufficiently faint close to the critical curve's position ($<21\,\mathrm{nJy}\,\mathrm{arcsec}^{-2}$ in F115W). This suggests that -- unlike previous caustic-crossing events or lensed stars -- thanks to the unprecedented depth of the GLIMPSE observations paired with the extreme lensing magnification (up to $μ\sim10^4$) we might be resolving the lower-mass ($M\sim1-11\,\mathrm{M}_{\odot}$) red stellar population. Concretely, we detect three likely extremely magnified asymptotic giant branch (AGB) stars ($T_{\mathrm{eff}}\sim3200-3750$ K), and one yellow super-giant star ($T_{\mathrm{eff}}\sim6750$ K) -- possibly a yellow hyper-giant or a Cepheid. In addition to offering the first glimpse at low-mass extremely magnified stars, these detections open a possible window into stellar populations, evolution, and chemical enrichment at high redshifts, and could pave the way for using lensed stars such as these as standard candles to populate the distance ladder at cosmological redshifts.

AI.tldr: JWST在Abell S1063星系团中发现了四个极其暗淡的红色点源，位于引力透镜弧上，可能是被极端放大的低质量恒星

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告了在最近对强透镜星系团Abell S1063的超深JWST/NIRCam图像中发现的四个极其微弱的（$m_{\mathrm{F444W}}\gtrsim29$）红色点源。所有四个源都位于透镜弧内，靠近其宿主星系红移（$z\sim1-4$）的临界曲线的对称点上。值得注意的是，这些点源出现在大多数足够接近临界曲线位置（F115W中$<21\,\mathrm{nJy}\,\mathrm{arcsec}^{-2}$）的弧中。这表明——与之前的尖点穿越事件或透镜恒星不同——由于GLIMPSE观测前所未有的深度与极端透镜放大（高达$μ\sim10^4$）相结合，我们可能正在解析较低质量（$M\sim1-11\,\mathrm{M}_{\odot}$）的红色恒星种群。具体来说，我们探测到三颗可能被极端放大的渐近巨星分支（AGB）恒星（$T_{\mathrm{eff}}\sim3200-3750$ K）和一颗黄色超巨星（$T_{\mathrm{eff}}\sim6750$ K）——可能是一颗黄色超巨星或造父变星。除了首次提供低质量极端放大恒星的观测外，这些探测为研究高红移恒星种群、演化和化学增丰开辟了可能的窗口，并可能为利用此类透镜恒星作为标准烛光来构建宇宙学红移处的距离阶梯铺平道路。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这是首次探测到被极端放大的低质量恒星，为研究高红移恒星种群开辟了新窗口，并可能利用这些透镜恒星作为标准烛光来构建宇宙学距离阶梯。

title: New constraints on stellar feedback through [O III] emission: interpreting ALMA and JWST observations with SPICE simulations
summary: ALMA and JWST have recently detected emission lines from the interstellar medium of star-forming galaxies during the Epoch of Reionization, reaching redshifts up to z = 14. Among these, [OIII] lines provide a powerful diagnostic of metal enrichment, gas ionization, and the impact of stellar feedback in galaxies at z > 6. Modeling this emission in cosmological simulations is challenging due to the wide range of spatial scales and physical processes involved. To address this, we have developed a post-processing pipeline that implements a sub-grid model for [OIII] line emission within the SPICE radiation-hydrodynamical simulations. These simulations explore three supernova feedback prescriptions: bursty-sn, smooth-sn, and the hypernova-based hyper-sn. We investigate how these feedback models affect metal enrichment, the neutral gas fraction, and the size and morphology of ionized halos traced by [OIII] emission in both the optical and far-infrared. We find that [OIII] emission predominantly originates from gas that is both shock-heated and radiatively ionized. We also examine the mass-metallicity relation and the correlation between neutral gas fraction and [OIII] luminosity. Our results show that the bursty-sn model efficiently ionizes gas but enriches galaxies less effectively by z = 5, leading to fewer bright [OIII] emitters compared to the smooth-sn model. Both bursty-sn and hyper-sn produce suppressed luminosity functions. Spatially resolved [OIII] emission further indicates that smooth-sn tends to generate more compact galaxies and slightly higher V/σ values, although there is significant overlap between models. Overall, our findings demonstrate that [OIII] emission is a sensitive tracer of stellar feedback at high redshift and highlight the importance of observations probing fainter luminosities, where feedback effects are strongest.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了后处理管道，在SPICE辐射流体动力学模拟中实现亚网格[OIII]线发射模型，比较三种超新星反馈机制对高红移星系金属丰度、中性气体分数和[OIII]发射的影响。
AI.motivation: ALMA和JWST在再电离时代(z>6)的恒星形成星系中探测到[OIII]发射线，这些线是金属富集、气体电离和恒星反馈的重要诊断工具。在宇宙学模拟中建模这种发射具有挑战性，需要解决广泛的空间尺度和物理过程。
AI.method: 开发了后处理管道，在SPICE辐射流体动力学模拟中实现亚网格[OIII]线发射模型。比较三种超新星反馈机制：bursty-sn（爆发式）、smooth-sn（平滑式）和hyper-sn（基于超新星的超新星模型）。研究这些模型对金属富集、中性气体分数以及光学和远红外[OIII]发射示踪的电离晕大小和形态的影响。
AI.result: 1. [OIII]发射主要来源于同时经历激波加热和辐射电离的气体；2. bursty-sn模型在z=5时能有效电离气体但金属富集效率较低，导致明亮的[OIII]发射体较少；3. bursty-sn和hyper-sn模型产生抑制的光度函数；4. smooth-sn模型倾向于产生更致密的星系和略高的V/σ值；5. 不同模型间存在显著重叠。
AI.conclusion: [OIII]发射是高红移恒星反馈的敏感示踪剂，观测探测更暗弱光度区域尤为重要，因为那里反馈效应最强。研究强调了不同反馈机制对星系演化和观测特征的重要影响。

artifacts.abstract_zh: ALMA和JWST最近探测到了再电离时期恒星形成星系星际介质的发射线，红移高达z=14。其中，[OIII]谱线为研究z>6星系的金属增丰、气体电离以及恒星反馈的影响提供了强有力的诊断。在宇宙学模拟中模拟这种发射具有挑战性，因为涉及的空间尺度和物理过程范围很广。为此，我们开发了一个后处理流程，在SPICE辐射流体动力学模拟中实现了[OIII]谱线发射的亚网格模型。这些模拟探索了三种超新星反馈方案：爆发式超新星（bursty-sn）、平滑超新星（smooth-sn）以及基于超新星的hyper-sn。我们研究了这些反馈模型如何影响金属增丰、中性气体分数，以及由[OIII]发射在光学和远红外波段示踪的电离晕的大小和形态。我们发现[OIII]发射主要来自同时受到激波加热和辐射电离的气体。我们还研究了质量-金属丰度关系以及中性气体分数与[OIII]光度之间的相关性。我们的结果表明，bursty-sn模型能有效电离气体，但在z=5时对星系的增丰效果较差，导致与smooth-sn模型相比，明亮的[OIII]发射体更少。bursty-sn和hyper-sn模型都产生了被抑制的光度函数。空间分辨的[OIII]发射进一步表明，smooth-sn模型倾向于产生更致密的星系和略高的V/σ值，尽管各模型之间存在显著重叠。总体而言，我们的发现表明[OIII]发射是高红移恒星反馈的灵敏示踪剂，并强调了探测更暗弱光度区域的重要性，因为那里反馈效应最强。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：[OIII]发射是高红移恒星反馈的灵敏示踪剂，观测探测更暗弱光度区域尤为重要，因为那里反馈效应最强。研究强调了不同反馈机制对星系演化和观测特征的重要影响。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Maps of surface brightness in [ O iii ] integrated along the line of sight at 5008 Å (top row) and 88 \(\mu\) m (bottom row) for the most massive galaxy at \(z=7\) . The first column shows the map for the bursty-sn model, the second for hyper-sn , and the third for smooth-sn . In each panel, the insets in the bottom-right corner display the velocity field maps derived from the luminosities at 5008 Å (top) and 88 \(\mu\) m (bottom). Additional labels indicate the total [ O iii ] luminosities at 5008 Å (top) and 88 \(\mu\) m (bottom), the stellar metallicity, and the neutral–gas fraction.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在z=7时，最质量星系沿视线方向积分的5008 Å（上行）和88 \(\mu\) m（下行）的[ O iii ]表面亮度图。第一列显示bursty-sn模型的图，第二列显示hyper-sn模型的图，第三列显示smooth-sn模型的图。在每个面板中，右下角的插图示出了由5008 Å（上）和88 \(\mu\) m（下）光度导出的速度场图。附加标签指示了5008 Å（上）和88 \(\mu\) m（下）的总[ O iii ]光度、恒星金属丰度和中性气体分数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Temperature–density diagram of gas cells in the most massive galaxy at \(z=5\) , for the bursty-sn (top panel) and smooth-sn (bottom panel) models. The 2D distribution is color-coded by the sum of intrinsic optical [ O iii ] luminosities in each density–temperature bin. The plot reveals a multiphase interstellar medium, structured as follows: diffuse, hot gas produced by stellar feedback ( a ); shocked gas ( b ); warm gas ionized by radiative feedback ( c ); warm gas in thermal equilibrium ( d ); cold, dense gas near the star formation threshold ( e ); thermally unstable gas transitioning between warm and cold phases ( f ). In the bursty-sn model, the bulk of the optical [ O iii ] emission is confined to region c , while in the smooth-sn case, [ O iii ] -emitting gas spans a broader temperature range, extending toward cooler phases.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：z=5时最质量星系中气体细胞的温度-密度图，分别对应bursty-sn（上方面板）和smooth-sn（下方面板）模型。二维分布的颜色编码表示每个密度-温度区间内固有光学[ O iii ]光度之和。该图揭示了一个多相星际介质，其结构如下：由恒星反馈产生的弥散、热气体（a）；激波加热气体（b）；由辐射反馈电离的暖气体（c）；处于热平衡的暖气体（d）；接近恒星形成阈值的冷、密气体（e）；在暖相和冷相之间过渡的热不稳定气体（f）。在bursty-sn模型中，大部分光学[ O iii ]发射局限于区域c，而在smooth-sn情况下，发射[ O iii ]的气体跨越更宽的温度范围，向更冷的相延伸。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Contribution from each gas phase to the total intrinsic optical [ O iii ] luminosity, at redshifts \(z=10\) , 7, and 5. Red, green, and blue bars represent results from the bursty-sn , hyper-sn , and smooth-sn feedback models, respectively. Following the notation introduced in Figure 2 , the histogram segments with diagonal stripe patterns correspond to the percentage of \(L_{[{O\textsc{iii}],optical}}\) originating from phase b , solid-pattern regions represent the contribution from phase c , while dotted-pattern regions indicate gas in thermal equilibrium in zone d . In general, gas impacted by radiative feedback dominates the [ O iii ] emission at \(z=7\) and 5, while at \(z=10\) this holds only for the smooth-sn model. In contrast, for the bursty-sn and hyper-sn models, shock-heated gas dominates the emission at that redshift.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在红移z=10、7和5处，每个气体相对总固有光学[ O iii ]光度的贡献。红色、绿色和蓝色条分别代表bursty-sn、hyper-sn和smooth-sn反馈模型的结果。沿用图2引入的标记，带有对角条纹图案的直方图段表示来自相b的\(L_{[{O\textsc{iii}],optical}}\)百分比，实心图案区域表示来自相c的贡献，而点状图案区域表示处于热平衡区域d中的气体。通常，受辐射反馈影响的气体在z=7和5时主导[ O iii ]发射，而在z=10时，这仅适用于smooth-sn模型。相比之下，对于bursty-sn和hyper-sn模型，激波加热气体在该红移处主导发射。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : The left y-axis shows the gas metallicities (dots), while the right y-axis indicates metallicities expressed in terms of [O/H] (crosses). Solid lines show the optical [ O iii ] luminosity-weighted mean relations in bins of stellar mass. Red, green, and blue points correspond to galaxies in the bursty-sn , hyper-sn , and smooth-sn feedback models, respectively. Observational estimates from ALMA and JWST are shown in black (Curti et al. 2023 ; Nakajima et al. 2023 ; Chemerynska et al. 2024 ; Rowland et al. 2026 ) . Across all redshifts and feedback models, SPICE galaxies follow linear mass–metallicity relation, in good agreement with extrapolations of observational trends.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左y轴显示气体金属丰度（点），右y轴表示以[O/H]表示的金属丰度（叉号）。实线显示按恒星质量分箱的光学[ O iii ]光度加权平均关系。红色、绿色和蓝色点分别对应bursty-sn、hyper-sn和smooth-sn反馈模型中的星系。来自ALMA和JWST的观测估计值以黑色显示（Curti et al. 2023；Nakajima et al. 2023；Chemerynska et al. 2024；Rowland et al. 2026）。在所有红移和反馈模型下，SPICE星系遵循线性质量-金属丰度关系，与观测趋势的外推结果吻合良好。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Dust-corrected luminosity functions of [ O iii ] at \(z=10\) , 7, and 5 for the bursty-sn (red), hyper-sn (green), and smooth-sn (blue) feedback models. Solid and dashed lines show median values for the emission at 5008 Å, and 88 \(\mu\) m, respectively. Black points represent JWST observational constraints for the 5008 Å LFs (Matthee et al. 2023 ; Meyer et al. 2024 ; Wold et al. 2025 ) . For both transitions, the smooth-sn model consistently produces a larger number of [ O iii ] -bright galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：在z=10、7和5处，bursty-sn（红色）、hyper-sn（绿色）和smooth-sn（蓝色）反馈模型的[ O iii ]尘埃校正光度函数。实线和虚线分别表示5008 Å和88 \(\mu\) m发射的中值。黑点代表5008 Å LF的JWST观测约束（Matthee et al. 2023；Meyer et al. 2024；Wold et al. 2025）。对于两种跃迁，smooth-sn模型始终产生更多数量的[ O iii ]明亮星系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Dust-corrected \(L_{\textup{$\mbox{[\text{O\,{iii}}]}$}}\) at 5008 Å (top) and 88 \(\mu\) m (bottom) as a function of the neutral gas fraction within the virial radius for galaxies at \(z=10\) (left) and \(z=5\) (right) in the bursty-sn (red), hyper-sn (green), and smooth-sn (blue) models. Contours enclose \(50\%\) and \(80\%\) of the data, while points indicate individual galaxies outside these contours. The gray-shaded areas mark the region where galaxies have \(L_{{[O\,III]},5008\text{\AA }}>10^{6}{L}_{\odot}\) (top) and \(L_{{[O\,III]},88,\mu{m}}>10^{4}{L}_{\odot}\) (bottom). While models overlap at \(z=10\) , at \(z=5\) bursty-sn yields lower neutral gas fractions. Despite having a higher neutral content, the smooth-sn model still hosts the most [ O iii ] -luminous galaxies at both wavelengths.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：在bursty-sn（红色）、hyper-sn（绿色）和smooth-sn（蓝色）模型中，z=10（左）和z=5（右）处星系维里半径内中性气体分数与尘埃校正的\(L_{\textup{$\mbox{[\text{O\,{iii}}]}$}}\)在5008 Å（上）和88 \(\mu\) m（下）的关系。等值线包围了\(50\%\)和\(80\%\)的数据，点表示这些等值线外的单个星系。灰色阴影区域标记了星系具有\(L_{{[O\,III]},5008\text{\AA }}>10^{6}{L}_{\odot}\)（上）和\(L_{{[O\,III]},88,\mu{m}}>10^{4}{L}_{\odot}\)（下）的区域。虽然模型在z=10时重叠，但在z=5时，bursty-sn产生较低的中性气体分数。尽管中性含量较高，smooth-sn模型在两个波长上仍然拥有最明亮的[ O iii ]星系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : Dust-corrected \(L_{\textup{$\mbox{[\text{O\,{iii}}]}$}}\) as a function of gas metallicity at \(z=10\) (top), \(z=7\) (middle) and \(z=5\) (bottom) for the bursty-sn (red), hyper-sn (green), and smooth-sn (blue) models. Lines indicate the median luminosities for the 5008 Å (solid) and the 88 \(\mu\) m (dashed) transition, while shaded regions represent the 16th–84th percentile range around the medians. Stars indicate single galaxies in metallicity bins where there are less than 4 objects. Gray points represent the full SPICE galaxy sample for the three models. All feedback models exhibit a clear positive correlation. We compare our results with galaxies observed with JWST at \(z>4\) (white diamonds, Curti et al. 2023 ; Laseter et al. 2024 ; Sanders et al. 2024 ; Rowland et al. 2026 ) . At \(z=5\) , the smooth-sn and hyper-sn models reach both the highest luminosities and metallicities.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：在bursty-sn（红色）、hyper-sn（绿色）和smooth-sn（蓝色）模型中，z=10（上）、z=7（中）和z=5（下）处气体金属丰度与尘埃校正的\(L_{\textup{$\mbox{[\text{O\,{iii}}]}$}}\)的关系。线条表示5008 Å（实线）和88 \(\mu\) m（虚线）跃迁的中值光度，阴影区域表示中值周围的第16至第84百分位范围。星号表示在金属丰度箱中少于4个天体的单个星系。灰色点代表三个模型的完整SPICE星系样本。所有反馈模型都显示出明确的正相关关系。我们将结果与JWST在z>4处观测到的星系进行比较（白色菱形，Curti et al. 2023；Laseter et al. 2024；Sanders et al. 2024；Rowland et al. 2026）。在z=5时，smooth-sn和hyper-sn模型同时达到最高的光度和金属丰度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8 : Redshift evolution of the \(L_{{[O\,III]},5008\,\text{\AA }}\) half-light radius, for the bursty-sn (red), hyper-sn (green) and smooth-sn (blue) stellar feedback models. Each point corresponds to the luminosity-weighted median value, and the error bars represent the 16th and 84th percentiles of the distribution. The top and bottom panels display the results for galaxies with \(10^{6}\,{M_{\odot}}\leq M_{\star}\leq 10^{8}\,{M_{\odot}}\) and \(M_{\star}>10^{8}\,{M_{\odot}}\) , respectively. In both panels bursty-sn produces the most extended [ O iii ] halos; although all models are consistent within the error bars.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：对于bursty-sn（红色）、hyper-sn（绿色）和smooth-sn（蓝色）恒星反馈模型，\(L_{{[O\,III]},5008\,\text{\AA }}\)半光半径的红移演化。每个点对应光度加权中值，误差棒表示分布的第16和第84百分位数。上方面板和下方面板分别显示恒星质量满足\(10^{6}\,{M_{\odot}}\leq M_{\star}\leq 10^{8}\,{M_{\odot}}\)和\(M_{\star}>10^{8}\,{M_{\odot}}\)的星系的结果。在两个面板中，bursty-sn产生最延展的[ O iii ]晕；尽管所有模型在误差棒范围内一致。

title: Extending the ALMA survey of the SCUBA-2 CLS UDS field: Tracing the obscured formation of spheroids across z~1-4
summary: We investigate the properties of 870-um selected galaxies at z~1-4 with FIR luminosities of LIR~1e11-1e13Lo, encompassing systems that dominate obscured activity at the peak of cosmic star formation, to identify variations in star-formation processes as a function of dust mass and redshift. We revisit ALMA 870-um continuum maps from the ALMA/SCUBA-2 UDS (AS2UDS) survey, lowering the source selection threshold from 4.3 sigma to 3.1 sigma to enlarge the sample with S870~1mJy. To reduce contamination from noise peaks, we match submm sources to a K-selected galaxy sample and apply cuts on photometric redshift and near-infrared (H-K) colour. This yields 84 sources in our extended AS2UDS survey, AS2UDSx, with S870=0.3-2.2mJy, doubling the sample at S870~1mJy relative to the original study. Using this expanded sample, we find that submm galaxies with S870~1mJy at z>~2.5 share properties with brighter, more active populations, while those at z<~2.5 are distinct, with lower gas fractions, shorter depletion times, and stellar morphologies from JWST imaging that show less structured dust obscuration, resembling less-active field galaxies. This indicates a shift in the characteristics of 870-um-selected galaxies at S870~1mJy and z~2, likely driven by the stability of their gas discs. Brighter and higher-z galaxies can sustain dense, globally unstable discs through efficient gas accretion, powering compact obscured starbursts. In contrast, fainter systems at z<~2.5 lack this accretion, leading to more stable discs and more extended dust continuum emission. This suggests a natural division around S870~1mJy and z~2: lower-z, fainter sources represent the most active secularly-driven extended star-forming discs, while similar and brighter, higher-z submm galaxies form a distinct population of compact starbursts within massive, unstable, gas-rich discs, consistent with progenitors of massive spheroids.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了红移z~1-4、870微米波段选择的星系，发现S870~1mJy和z~2是一个关键分界点：高红移(z>2.5)的星系具有更活跃的恒星形成特性，而低红移(z<2.5)的星系则更类似于普通场星系。
AI.motivation: 研究870微米波段选择星系的性质变化，特别是随着尘埃质量和红移的变化，以理解恒星形成过程在宇宙恒星形成峰值时期的演化规律。
AI.method: 重新分析ALMA/SCUBA-2 UDS (AS2UDS)调查的870微米连续谱图，将源选择阈值从4.3σ降低到3.1σ以扩大样本。通过匹配K波段选择星系样本并应用光度和近红外颜色筛选，减少噪声峰污染，最终获得84个源组成的扩展样本AS2UDSx。
AI.result: 发现S870~1mJy的亚毫米星系在z>2.5时与更亮、更活跃的星系群具有相似性质，而在z<2.5时则具有较低气体分数、较短耗尽时间，JWST成像显示其尘埃遮蔽结构较少，类似于活动性较低的场星系。
AI.conclusion: 870微米选择星系在S870~1mJy和z~2处存在自然分界：低红移、较暗的源代表最活跃的长期驱动的扩展恒星形成盘，而类似或更亮的高红移亚毫米星系则形成了一类独特的致密星暴星系，这些星系位于质量大、不稳定、富含气体的盘中，与大质量球状星系的祖先一致。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们研究了红移z~1-4、远红外光度LIR~1e11-1e13Lo的870微米选择星系的特性，这些星系涵盖了宇宙恒星形成峰值时期主导遮蔽活动的系统，旨在识别恒星形成过程随尘埃质量和红移的变化。我们重新审视了ALMA/SCUBA-2 UDS（AS2UDS）巡天中的ALMA 870微米连续谱图，将源选择阈值从4.3σ降低到3.1σ，以扩大S870~1mJy的样本。为减少噪声峰的污染，我们将亚毫米源与K选星系样本匹配，并应用了测光红移和近红外（H-K）颜色的截断。这在我们扩展的AS2UDS巡天（AS2UDSx）中产生了84个源，其S870=0.3-2.2mJy，使S870~1mJy处的样本量相对于原始研究翻倍。利用这个扩大的样本，我们发现红移z>~2.5、S870~1mJy的亚毫米星系与更亮、更活跃的群体具有相似的性质，而红移z<~2.5的源则截然不同，它们具有较低的气体分数、较短的耗尽时间，以及来自JWST成像的恒星形态显示出较少结构的尘埃遮蔽，类似于不太活跃的场星系。这表明在S870~1mJy和z~2处，870微米选择星系的特征发生了转变，这很可能由其气体盘的稳定性驱动。更亮和更高红移的星系可以通过高效的气体吸积维持致密、全局不稳定的盘，从而驱动紧凑的遮蔽星暴。相比之下，红移z<~2.5的较暗系统缺乏这种吸积，导致更稳定的盘和更延展的尘埃连续谱发射。这表明在S870~1mJy和z~2附近存在一个自然分界：较低红移、较暗的源代表最活跃的长期驱动的延展恒星形成盘，而类似或更亮的高红移亚毫米星系则形成了一类独特的致密星暴星系，这些星系位于质量大、不稳定、富含气体的盘中，与大质量球状星系的祖先一致。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：870微米选择星系在S870~1mJy和z~2处存在自然分界：低红移、较暗的源代表最活跃的长期驱动的扩展恒星形成盘，而类似或更亮的高红移亚毫米星系则形成了一类独特的致密星暴星系，这些星系位于质量大、不稳定、富含气体的盘中，与大质量球状星系的祖先一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The cumulative distributions of positive and (unphysical) negative sources matched to \(K\) -band counterparts (with likelihoods of being a random association of \(P\) \(\leq\) 0.05) as a function of a) 870- \(\mu\) m signal-to-noise measured in a 0.5 ′′ diameter aperture, SNR 0.5 , and b) 870- \(\mu\) m flux density, \(S_{870\mu m}\) . We also show the same distributions for the samples of positive and negative sources after applying selections for \(z_{med}\) \(\geq\) 1 and \((H-K)\) \(\geq\) 0.4, as shown in Figure 2. The selected positive sources have 870- \(\mu\) m flux densities ranging from \(S_{870\mu m}\) \(\sim\) 0.27–2.2 mJy.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：匹配到\(K\)波段对应体（随机关联概率\(P\) \(\leq\) 0.05）的正源和（非物理）负源的累积分布，作为a) 在0.5 ′′直径孔径内测量的870- \(\mu\) m信噪比SNR 0.5的函数，以及b) 870- \(\mu\) m流量密度\(S_{870\mu m}\)的函数。我们还展示了在应用\(z_{med}\) \(\geq\) 1和\((H-K)\) \(\geq\) 0.4选择后（如图2所示）的正源和负源样本的相同分布。所选正源的870- \(\mu\) m流量密度范围为\(S_{870\mu m}\) \(\sim\) 0.27–2.2 mJy。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: a) The cumulative distribution of \(K\) -band-matched positive and negative sources as a function of \((H-K)\) colour. The numbers roughly match at \((H-K)\) \(\sim\) 0.4 (vertical line), beyond which the fraction of positive sources with red counterparts rises rapidly. The distribution for the \(S_{870\mu m}\) \(\leq\) 2 mJy AS2UDS sample (Dudzevičiūtė et al., 2020 ) shows the expected colours of real faint submillimetre galaxies, with most having \((H-K)\) \(\mathrel{\raise 1.35626pt\hbox{$\scriptstyle>$}\kern-4.62497pt\lower 1.54996pt\hbox{{$\scriptstyle\sim$}}}\) 0.4. b) The cumulative distribution of positive and negative sources as a function of magphys -derived photometric redshift, \(z_{med}\) . The AS2UDS \(S_{870\mu m}\) \(\leq\) 2 mJy sample illustrates that most real faint submillimetre galaxies have \(z_{med}\) \(\mathrel{\raise 1.35626pt\hbox{$\scriptstyle>$}\kern-4.62497pt\lower 1.54996pt\hbox{{$\scriptstyle\sim$}}}\) 1. The \(z_{med}\) \(\geq\) 1 cut corresponds to where positive and negative sources are comparable, above which positives rapidly dominate. c) The distribution of \((H-K)\) colour versus \(z_{med}\) for positive and negative samples, and the AS2UDS comparison sample. The adopted selection ( \((H-K)\) \(\geq\) 0.4, \(z_{med}\) \(\geq\) 1; shown by lines) is \(\sim\) 90 per cent complete based on AS2UDS, yielding 84 positive and 6 negative sources, implying \(\sim\) 7 per cent contamination from spurious matches. Median errors for the positive sample are shown in the lower left.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：a) 匹配到\(K\)波段的正源和负源作为\((H-K)\)颜色函数的累积分布。在\((H-K)\) \(\sim\) 0.4（垂直线）处数量大致匹配，超过该值，具有红色对应体的正源比例迅速上升。\(S_{870\mu m}\) \(\leq\) 2 mJy的AS2UDS样本（Dudzevičiūtė et al., 2020）的分布显示了真实暗弱亚毫米星系的预期颜色，大多数具有\((H-K)\) \(\mathrel{\raise 1.35626pt\hbox{$\scriptstyle>$}\kern-4.62497pt\lower 1.54996pt\hbox{{$\scriptstyle\sim$}}}\) 0.4。b) 正源和负源作为magphys导出的测光红移\(z_{med}\)函数的累积分布。AS2UDS \(S_{870\mu m}\) \(\leq\) 2 mJy样本说明大多数真实暗弱亚毫米星系具有\(z_{med}\) \(\mathrel{\raise 1.35626pt\hbox{$\scriptstyle>$}\kern-4.62497pt\lower 1.54996pt\hbox{{$\scriptstyle\sim$}}}\) 1。\(z_{med}\) \(\geq\) 1截断对应于正源和负源数量相当的区域，超过该区域正源迅速占主导。c) \((H-K)\)颜色与\(z_{med}\)的分布，针对正源和负源样本以及AS2UDS比较样本。采用的选择（\((H-K)\) \(\geq\) 0.4，\(z_{med}\) \(\geq\) 1；由线条显示）基于AS2UDS的完备度约为90%，产生84个正源和6个负源，意味着约7%的虚假匹配污染。正源样本的中值误差显示在左下角。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Faint and bright samples. Median sample properties with bootstrap errors and 16 th /84 th percentile ranges.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：暗弱和明亮样本。具有自举误差和16%/84%百分位范围的中值样本属性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The distributions of derived physical properties for the final positive and negative AS2UDSx source samples with \(S_{870\mu m}\) \(=\) 0.5–1.5 mJy: a) dust mass; b) stellar mass; c) star-formation rate; d) visual attenuation. These are compared to those of the \(S_{870\mu m}\) \(=\) 0.5–1.5 mJy and \(S_{870\mu m}\) \(\geq\) 4 mJy samples from AS2UDS. The properties of the final positive sample of 65 AS2UDSx sources with \(S_{870\mu m}\) \(=\) 0.5–1.5 mJy are statistically indistinguishable from the 57 AS2UDS sources at the same flux densities and so they were combined to create a total sample of 122 ALMA-selected sources with \(S_{870\mu m}\) \(=\) 0.5–1.5 mJy within the UDS field. These faint submillimetre galaxies have much lower dust masses than the \(S_{870\mu m}\) \(\geq\) 4 mJy sample from AS2UDS, this reflects the tight relation between 870- \(\mu\) m flux density and dust mass, as well as lower star-formation rates, but more similar stellar masses and restframe \(V\) -band attenuations.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：最终AS2UDSx正源和负源样本（\(S_{870\mu m}\) \(=\) 0.5–1.5 mJy）的导出物理属性分布：a) 尘埃质量；b) 恒星质量；c) 恒星形成率；d) 视觉消光。这些与AS2UDS中\(S_{870\mu m}\) \(=\) 0.5–1.5 mJy和\(S_{870\mu m}\) \(\geq\) 4 mJy样本的分布进行了比较。65个\(S_{870\mu m}\) \(=\) 0.5–1.5 mJy的AS2UDSx最终正源样本的属性与相同流量密度的57个AS2UDS源在统计上无法区分，因此它们被合并，在UDS场内创建了一个包含122个ALMA选择源（\(S_{870\mu m}\) \(=\) 0.5–1.5 mJy）的总样本。这些暗弱亚毫米星系的尘埃质量远低于AS2UDS中\(S_{870\mu m}\) \(\geq\) 4 mJy的样本，这反映了870- \(\mu\) m流量密度与尘埃质量之间的紧密关系，以及较低的恒星形成率，但恒星质量和静止系\(V\)波段消光更为相似。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: a) The relation between 870- \(\mu\) m flux density, \(S_{870\mu m}\) , and photometric redshift, \(z_{med}\) for AS2UDSx and AS2UDS (Stach et al., 2019 ; Dudzevičiūtė et al., 2020 ) . Large outlined symbols show medians and bootstrap errors for AS2UDSx and flux-binned AS2UDS. The AS2UDSx median is corrected for \(\sim\) 10 per cent incompleteness in high-redshift sources due to the \(K\) -band requirement (see §3.1), with the lower redshift error bar indicating this correction. The solid and dot-dashed lines show the best-fit trend and 1- \(\sigma\) error from Stach et al. ( 2019 ) , which the faint AS2UDSx sample broadly follows. b) Stellar mass, \(M_{\ast}\) , versus \(S_{870\mu m}\) shows a weak trend to lower masses at fainter fluxes: \(M_{\ast}\propto S_{870\mu m}^{0.25}\) , a factor \(\sim\) 2 across \(S_{870\mu m}\) \(=\) 0.5–10 mJy. figures.caption_zh: 图4：a) AS2UDSx和AS2UDS（Stach et al., 2019；Dudzevičiūtė et al., 2020）的870- \(\mu\) m流量密度\(S_{870\mu m}\)与测光红移\(z_{med}\)之间的关系。大的轮廓符号显示AS2UDSx和流量分箱AS2UDS的中值和自举误差。AS2UDSx中值已针对由于\(K\)波段要求导致的高红移源约10%的不完备性进行了校正（见§3.1），较低的红移误差棒指示了该校正。实线和点划线显示了Stach et al.（2019）的最佳拟合趋势和1- \(\sigma\)误差，暗弱AS2UDSx样本大致遵循该趋势。b) 恒星质量\(M_{\ast}\)与\(S_{870\mu m}\)的关系显示在更暗流量处有向更低质量的弱趋势：\(M_{\ast}\propto S_{870\mu m}^{0.25}\)，在\(S_{870\mu m}\) \(=\) 0.5–10 mJy范围内变化约2倍。恒定尘埃-恒星质量比（0.1, 0.01, \(5\times 10^{-4}\)）的线表明暗弱源中\(M_{\ast}\)和\(M_{d}/M_{\ast}\)比值略低。c) 相对于\(K\)选场样本（Dudzevičiūtė et al., 2020）的sSFR偏移\(\DeltasSFR\)，显示对\(S_{870\mu m}\)无显著依赖。d) 当前SFR（最近\(\sim\) 100 Myr）与时间平均SFR（\(M_{\ast}/{Age}\)）的比值在明亮源中接近\(\sim\) 1，但暗弱源显示出约0.4 dex更大的弥散，表明更多样化的演化历史。e) 气体分数\(M_{gas}/M_{\ast}\)随\(S_{870\mu m}\)降低而下降，AS2UDSx和暗弱AS2UDS样本遵循更明亮的趋势。f) 耗尽时间\(M_{gas}/{SFR}\)在更暗流量密度处减小，最暗样本大致与该趋势一致。

( 2020 ) , identified by “U4” prefixes, see §2. title: Dynamically cold discs in high-redshift galaxies: comparison between ALMA observations and TNG50
summary: Observations of highly rotationally supported gas discs in high redshift ($z$ > 3) star-forming galaxies challenge our understanding of galaxy formation, as the prevailing view holds that galaxies in the early universe are dynamically hot due to frequent mergers, gas accretion, and strong stellar feedback. We examined the kinematic properties of massive ($M_{\star} \geq 10^{10}\,M_{\odot}$) star-forming galaxies in the TNG50 cosmological hydrodynamical simulation in the redshift range $3\leq z \leq 5$. Mock emission line datacubes were constructed and analysed using the same methodology as for [CII] observations with ALMA. We measured the ratio of the gas rotation velocity ($V$) to velocity dispersion ($σ$) finding that most galaxies have $V/σ\sim$ $2-3$, lower than observed. However, a few simulated galaxies show $V/σ$ > 5. Such "cold" discs, selected at $z=4$, remain dynamically colder than most of the TNG population across $z=3-5$. A galaxy with $V/σ\gtrsim10$ appears in a transient phase that lasts $\leq200$ Myr. Dynamically cold disc formation in TNG50 is promoted by gas accretion with angular momentum aligned with the pre-existing disc, while most galaxies undergo misaligned accretion. Dynamically cold discs also show lower mass accretion rates and better aligned stellar and dark-matter angular momentum vectors. By tracing their evolution to $z = 0$, we find that one-third become massive disc galaxies and two-thirds become ETGs.

AI.tldr: TNG50模拟显示高红移星系中高度旋转支撑的气体盘比观测到的少，但少数星系确实存在"冷盘"（V/σ>5），这些冷盘形成需要角动量对齐的气体吸积，且最终三分之一演化为盘星系，三分之二演化为椭圆星系。
AI.motivation: 观测发现高红移（z>3）星系中存在高度旋转支撑的气体盘，这与传统认为早期宇宙星系因频繁合并、气体吸积和强恒星反馈而动态热的观点相矛盾，需要研究这种动态冷盘的形成机制。
AI.method: 使用TNG50宇宙学流体动力学模拟，分析红移3≤z≤5范围内大质量恒星形成星系（M⋆≥10¹⁰M⊙）的运动学特性。构建模拟发射线数据立方体，采用与ALMA观测[CII]相同的方法分析，测量气体旋转速度与速度弥散比（V/σ）。
AI.result: 大多数模拟星系V/σ约为2-3，低于观测值，但少数星系确实存在V/σ>5的"冷盘"。这些冷盘在z=4时形成，在z=3-5期间保持比大多数TNG星系更冷。V/σ≳10的星系出现在短暂阶段（≤200 Myr）。冷盘形成需要角动量与现有盘对齐的气体吸积，而大多数星系经历不对齐吸积。
AI.conclusion: TNG50模拟中动态冷盘的形成需要特定条件：角动量对齐的气体吸积、较低的质量吸积率以及恒星和暗物质角动量矢量的更好对齐。追踪到z=0时，三分之一冷盘演化为大质量盘星系，三分之二演化为椭圆星系。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 对高红移（$z$ > 3）恒星形成星系中高度旋转支撑的气体盘的观测挑战了我们对星系形成的理解，因为主流观点认为早期宇宙中的星系由于频繁的并合、气体吸积和强烈的恒星反馈而处于动力学热状态。我们研究了TNG50宇宙学流体动力学模拟中红移范围$3\leq z \leq 5$内大质量（$M_{\star} \geq 10^{10}\,M_{\odot}$）恒星形成星系的运动学性质。我们构建了模拟发射线数据立方体，并采用与ALMA [CII] 观测相同的方法进行分析。我们测量了气体旋转速度（$V$）与速度弥散（$σ$）之比，发现大多数星系的$V/σ\sim$ $2-3$，低于观测值。然而，少数模拟星系显示出$V/σ$ > 5。这些在$z=4$处选出的“冷”盘，在$z=3-5$范围内始终比大多数TNG50星系群动力学温度更低。一个$V/σ\gtrsim10$的星系出现在一个持续$\leq200$ Myr的瞬态阶段。TNG50中动力学冷盘的形成由角动量与已有盘面对齐的气体吸积所促进，而大多数星系经历的是未对齐的吸积。动力学冷盘还显示出较低的质量吸积率以及恒星和暗物质角动量矢量更好的对齐。通过追踪它们到$z = 0$的演化，我们发现三分之一演变为大质量盘星系，三分之二演变为早型星系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，TNG50模拟中动态冷盘的形成需要特定条件：角动量对齐的气体吸积、较低的质量吸积率以及恒星和暗物质角动量矢量的更好对齐。追踪到z=0时，三分之一冷盘演化为大质量盘星系，三分之二演化为椭圆星系。

The upper and lower panels show the face-on and edge-on views, respectively.

The top row displays the cold disc galaxy, while the second and third rows show two representative chaotic galaxies. The physical scale bar and beam are included in the bottom left of intensity maps and velocity field panels, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：从我们在\(z=4.43\)快照中呈现的三个选定TNG50星系的中性氢模拟观测中提取的强度图、速度场以及位置-速度切片（沿主轴\(\phi=90^{\circ}\)和次轴\(\phi=180^{\circ}\)）。顶行显示冷盘星系，而第二行和第三行显示两个代表性的混沌星系。物理比例尺和波束分别包含在强度图和速度场面板的左下角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Comparison of \(V/\sigma\) values of dynamically cold discs in TNG50 obtained either directly from the simulations (x-axis) or from the mock datacubes (y-axis). Each point represents one simulated galaxy, coloured by its asymmetry ( \(A\) ) value. Horizontal and vertical error bars indicate simulation and mock uncertainties, respectively. The solid green line marks the 1:1 relation and the dashed line the 1-sigma scatter.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：TNG50中动力学冷盘的\(V/\sigma\)值比较，分别直接来自模拟（x轴）或来自模拟数据立方体（y轴）。每个点代表一个模拟星系，按其不对称性（\(A\)）值着色。水平误差棒和垂直误差棒分别表示模拟和模拟观测的不确定性。实绿线表示1:1关系，虚线表示1-sigma弥散。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The V/ \(\sigma\) ratio as a function of redshift for cold gas in star-forming galaxies from TNG50, compared to the V/ \(\sigma\) ratios in real galaxies observed with ALMA in the [CII] emission line. The dark blue curve shows the median V/ \(\sigma\) in all the simulated galaxies in this mass range at the different times of the available snapshots. The band shows 1-sigma deviation from the median. Galaxies with V/ \(\sigma\) values greater than 1-sigma above the median value are defined as cold discs (blue crosses).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：TNG50恒星形成星系中冷气体的\(V/\sigma\)比值随红移的变化，与使用ALMA在[CII]发射线中观测到的真实星系的\(V/\sigma\)比值进行比较。深蓝色曲线显示了在可用快照的不同时间点，该质量范围内所有模拟星系的中位\(V/\sigma\)值。带状区域表示与中位值的1-sigma偏差。\(V/\sigma\)值高于中位值1-sigma以上的星系被定义为冷盘（蓝色十字）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Distribution of the asymmetry parameter \(A\) for simulated cold disc galaxies, all star-forming simulated galaxies, and observed galaxies from Roman-Oliveira et al. ( 2023 ) . Galaxies with \(A<0.35\) are classified as symmetric.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：模拟冷盘星系、所有恒星形成模拟星系以及来自Roman-Oliveira等人（2023）的观测星系的不对称参数\(A\)的分布。\(A<0.35\)的星系被分类为对称的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Evolution of gas properties of simulated galaxies selected as cold discs at \(z=4\) (coloured solid lines for single galaxies, deep blue dashed lines show the median value, deep blue shaded region for 16th to 84th percentiles) compared to the general TNG50 population of star-forming galaxies at \(z=4\) (light blue dashed line for median, light blue shaded region for 16th to 84th percentiles). By gas, we always mean neutral hydrogen (see Section 2.3 ). Top Left Panel: \(V/\sigma\) of the gas in the disc. Top Right Panel: ratio of the total angular momentum of the gas accreted between two subsequent snapshots over the angular momentum of the gaseous disc. Bottom Left Panel: mass ratio of new accreted gas over the disc gas at the current snapshot. Bottom Right Panel: misalignment between the angular momentum direction of accreted gas and the spin direction of the disc gas, measured as the dot product of two unit vectors (1 means perfect alignment).
figures.caption_zh: 图6：在\(z=4\)处被选为冷盘的模拟星系的气体性质演化（单星系用彩色实线表示，深蓝色虚线表示中位值，深蓝色阴影区域表示第16至第84百分位数），与\(z=4\)处一般TNG50恒星形成星系群（浅蓝色虚线表示中位值，浅蓝色阴影区域表示第16至第84百分位数）进行比较。我们所说的气体总是指中性氢（见第2.3节）。左上图：盘中气体的\(V/\sigma\)。右上图：两个连续快照之间吸积气体的总角动量与气体盘角动量之比。左下图：新吸积气体质量与当前快照中盘气体质量之比。右下图：吸积气体角动量方向与盘气体自旋方向之间的未对齐程度，以两个单位矢量的点积衡量（1表示完美对齐）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Evolution of stellar properties of simulated galaxies selected as dynamically cold discs at \(z=4\) (coloured solid lines for single galaxies, deep blue dashed lines show the median value, deep blue shaded region for 16th to 84th percentiles) compared to the general TNG50 population of star-forming galaxies at \(z=4\) (light blue dashed line for median, light blue shaded region for 16th to 84th percentiles). Top Left Panel: \(V/\sigma\) of the stellar disc over time. Top Right Panel: alignment between the spin direction of gas and stars in the disc, measured as the dot product of two unit vectors (1 means perfect alignment). Bottom Left Panel: ratio of accreted stellar mass over the mass of the stellar component in the disc. Bottom Right Panel: misalignment between the angular momentum direction of accreted stars and the spin direction of the galaxy stellar discs, measured as the dot product of two unit vectors.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：在\(z=4\)处被选为动力学冷盘的模拟星系的恒星性质演化（单星系用彩色实线表示，深蓝色虚线表示中位值，深蓝色阴影区域表示第16至第84百分位数），与\(z=4\)处一般TNG50恒星形成星系群（浅蓝色虚线表示中位值，浅蓝色阴影区域表示第16至第84百分位数）进行比较。左上图：恒星盘随时间的\(V/\sigma\)。右上图：盘中气体和恒星自旋方向之间的对齐程度，以两个单位矢量的点积衡量（1表示完美对齐）。左下图：吸积恒星质量与盘中恒星成分质量之比。右下图：吸积恒星角动量方向与星系恒星盘自旋方向之间的未对齐程度，以两个单位矢量的点积衡量。

title: GOALS-JWST: Resolved multi-phase molecular gas in IRAS 20551-4250 using JWST and ALMA
comment: Accepted for publication in MNRAS, 18 pages, 15 figures, 1 table
summary: Studying the content and distribution of molecular gas provides key insights into how feedback from Active Galactic Nuclei (AGN) and star formation influences galaxy evolution, since molecular gas is the primary fuel for star formation. Ultra-Luminous Infrared Galaxies (ULIRGs) are ideal candidates to study how AGN and/or starbursts affect the interstellar medium due to their intense AGN and star forming activity. We present spatially-resolved multi-phase molecular gas study of IRAS20551-4250, a nearby ($z=0.0429$) ULIRG, using JWST/MIRI-MRS and ALMA. Mid-infrared diagnostics do not rule out the presence of AGN in IRAS20551-4250. [OIII]$λ$5007 in VLT/MUSE data reveal ionised gas outflows with $w_{80}^{\rm [OIII]} \sim 790$ km s$^{-1}$ and $\dot{M}_{\rm out}^{\rm[OIII]}<0.01$ M$_{\odot}$ yr$^{-1}$. No outflows are observed in either molecular phases. JWST/MIRI-MRS data reveal several rotational transitions of warm H$_{2}$ (T$\sim500-1400$ K) within the central $\sim4\times4$ kpc$^{2}$ region. Excitation temperature maps suggest that the warm H$_{2}$ is primarily heated by UV radiation from the central source. The CO-based cold molecular component dominates the molecular gas mass, accounting for $>$95% of the total molecular gas mass. Warm H$_{2}$ maps show two tidal tails and the velocity centroid maps show disturbed, non-rotational motions and a systematic gradient across the field-of-view, similar to that of ALMA CO-based cold molecular gas and consistent with a late-stage merger. Together, our analysis indicate that the molecular gas composition in IRAS20551-4250 is consistent with ongoing star formation in the host galaxy and the outflows observed in ionised gas phase appear insufficient to expel the molecular gas or quench ongoing star formation.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 研究分子气体的含量和分布为了解活动星系核（AGN）和恒星形成反馈如何影响星系演化提供了关键信息，因为分子气体是恒星形成的主要燃料。超亮红外星系（ULIRGs）由于其强烈的AGN和恒星形成活动，是研究AGN和/或星暴如何影响星际介质的理想候选体。我们利用JWST/MIRI-MRS和ALMA对IRAS20551-4250（一个邻近的（z=0.0429）ULIRG）进行了空间分辨的多相分子气体研究。中红外诊断不排除IRAS20551-4250中存在AGN。VLT/MUSE数据中的[OIII]λ5007揭示了电离气体外流，其w_{80}^{\rm [OIII]} ~ 790 km s^{-1}，\dot{M}_{\rm out}^{\rm[OIII]}<0.01 M_{\odot} yr^{-1}。在两个分子相中均未观测到外流。JWST/MIRI-MRS数据揭示了中心约4×4 kpc^{2}区域内暖H_{2}（T~500-1400 K）的几个转动跃迁。激发温度图表明，暖H_{2}主要由中心源的紫外辐射加热。基于CO的冷分子成分主导了分子气体质量，占总分子气体质量的>95%。暖H_{2}图显示了两条潮汐尾，速度质心图显示了受扰动的、非旋转的运动以及整个视场中的系统性梯度，这与ALMA基于CO的冷分子气体相似，并与晚期并合一致。总之，我们的分析表明，IRAS20551-4250中的分子气体组成与宿主星系中持续的恒星形成一致，在电离气体相中观测到的外流似乎不足以驱逐分子气体或抑制正在进行的恒星形成。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，IRAS20551-4250的分子气体组成与宿主星系中持续的恒星形成一致，观测到的电离气体外流强度不足以驱逐分子气体或抑制正在进行的恒星形成。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The top panels show images from HST/ACS F814W (top left), JWST/NIRCam F277W (top middle) and JWST/MIRI F770W (top right) covering the full range of spatial scales of IR20551. The horizontal bar in all the top panels show the 10 kpc physical scale. The overlaid white circle, red rectangle, orange rectangle and blue rectangle in the top left image shows the ALMA, MIRI, NIRCam and MUSE coverage regions. The black rectangle in the top right panel shows the regions covered by Channels 1 and 4 of the MRS. The bottom panels show the same sequence as the top panels, but zoomed in the central \(5\times 5\) arcsec 2 region of the galaxy. The HST and NIRCam images clearly show the presence of extended tidal tail towards the SE direction from the galaxy centre. The MIRI image shows a faint SE tail, but a prominent NW tail, not clearly visible in the HST and NIRCam images. The HST image does not show a clear point source in the centre, but shows clumpy morphology within the central region, while the NIRCam and MIRI images show a very bright point source at the centre. In fact, the central region in the MIRI image is saturated due to emission from a putative AGN. The horizontal bar shows the 1 kpc physical scale in the bottom panels. The cyan star marks the location of the putative AGN. North is up and East is left in all panels.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：顶部面板显示了来自HST/ACS F814W（左上）、JWST/NIRCam F277W（中上）和JWST/MIRI F770W（右上）的图像，覆盖了IR20551的完整空间尺度范围。所有顶部面板中的水平条显示了10 kpc的物理尺度。左上图像中叠加的白色圆圈、红色矩形、橙色矩形和蓝色矩形分别显示了ALMA、MIRI、NIRCam和MUSE的覆盖区域。右上面板中的黑色矩形显示了MRS通道1和4覆盖的区域。底部面板显示了与顶部面板相同的序列，但放大了星系中心5×5 arcsec^{2}区域。HST和NIRCam图像清楚地显示了从星系中心向东南方向延伸的潮汐尾。MIRI图像显示了一条微弱的东南尾，但有一条突出的西北尾，在HST和NIRCam图像中并不清晰可见。HST图像在中心没有显示清晰的点源，但显示了中心区域内的团块状形态，而NIRCam和MIRI图像在中心显示了一个非常亮的点源。事实上，MIRI图像中的中心区域由于来自假定AGN的发射而饱和。底部面板中的水平条显示了1 kpc的物理尺度。青色星标记了假定AGN的位置。所有面板中北向上，东向左。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Top left panel shows the median MRS image of IR20551 in Channel-3. The red and blue circles show the aperture of extraction for nuclear (R = 0.5 arcsec) and integrated spectra (R = 1.5 arcsec), respectively. The top right panel shows the full MRS spectra from all four channels from the nuclear (red) and integrated (blue) apertures. The nuclear aperture is offset by an arbitrary factor for better visualisation. Archival Spitzer spectra of IR20551 is shown as black dashed line, which showcases the improvement in the quality of spectra with JWST/MIRI-MRS. The MRS spectra of IR20551 shows a combination of narrow lines, PAH emission and silicate absorption features at \(\sim 6.2\mu\) m and \(\sim 9.7\mu\) m. The bottom four panels show the same spectra as the top right panel, but zoomed in on four different regions of the MRS spectra and the strong emission line features labelled. Rotational transitions of H 2 (S(1)–S(8)) are detected, along with PAH and low-ionisation lines such as [ Ne ii ]. High ionisation emission lines such as [ Ne v ]14.322 are not detected or are weak (see also Fig. 17 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左上面板显示了IR20551在通道3中的中值MRS图像。红色和蓝色圆圈分别显示了核区（R = 0.5 arcsec）和积分光谱（R = 1.5 arcsec）的提取孔径。右上面板显示了来自核区（红色）和积分（蓝色）孔径的所有四个通道的完整MRS光谱。核区孔径为了更好的可视化而偏移了一个任意因子。IR20551的档案Spitzer光谱以黑色虚线显示，展示了JWST/MIRI-MRS光谱质量的改进。IR20551的MRS光谱显示了窄线、PAH发射和~6.2\mu m及~9.7\mu m处的硅酸盐吸收特征的组合。底部四个面板显示了与右上面板相同的光谱，但放大了MRS光谱的四个不同区域，并标记了强发射线特征。检测到了H_{2}的转动跃迁（S(1)–S(8)），以及PAH和低电离线如[Ne ii]。高电离发射线如[Ne v]14.322未被检测到或很弱（另见图17）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The nuclear (left) and integrated (right) MRS spectra of IR20551, with the total continuum model and PAH emission line fits from CAFE overlaid. The individual components from AGN, starburst, hot, warm and cold dust etc are not shown due to high degree of degeneracy between these different components. The CAFE model reproduces the overall mid-infrared continuum well, along with the PAH emission and silicate absorption features.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：IR20551的核区（左）和积分（右）MRS光谱，叠加了来自CAFE的总连续谱模型和PAH发射线拟合。由于这些不同成分之间存在高度简并，未显示来自AGN、星暴、热尘埃、暖尘埃和冷尘埃等的各个成分。CAFE模型很好地再现了整体中红外连续谱，以及PAH发射和硅酸盐吸收特征。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Rotational hydrogen lines (S(1) – S(8)) from the nuclear (solid red) and integrated (solid blue) spectra and respective single Gaussian fits (dashed lines). The rotational transitions do not show any asymmetry and are reproduced using a single Gaussian function, suggesting that there is no evidence for fast moving warm molecular gas associated with an outflow. S(6) line is affected by an absorption feature towards the right of the profile from the instrument, which is well fit with an inverted Gaussian component.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：来自核区（实心红色）和积分（实心蓝色）光谱的转动氢线（S(1) – S(8)）及其各自的单高斯拟合（虚线）。转动跃迁未显示任何不对称性，并使用单高斯函数再现，表明没有证据表明存在与外流相关的快速移动的暖分子气体。S(6)线受到来自仪器的轮廓右侧吸收特征的影响，该特征用一个反高斯分量很好地拟合。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Basic properties of the emission lines measured in the MRS spectra of IR20551 from apertures of radii, R = 0.5 and 1.5 arcsec. (1): Emission line feature, (2): The rest-frame wavelength of the line in \(\mu\) m, (3), (4) & (5): observed velocity offset of the emission line from the expected location based on its redshift (determined from the location of [ O iii ] \(\lambda\) 5007 line in the optical MUSE spectra), line width (FWHM, corrected for the spectral resolution) and line flux within the 0.5 arcsec aperture, (6), (7) & (8): same as (3), (4) and (5), respectively, but within the 1.5 arcsec aperture. The quoted errors indicate 1 \(\sigma\) uncertainty.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：从半径R = 0.5和1.5 arcsec的孔径中测量的IR20551 MRS光谱中发射线的基本性质。(1)：发射线特征，(2)：线的静止波长（单位为\mu m），(3)、(4)和(5)：观测到的发射线相对于基于其红移（由光学MUSE光谱中[O iii] λ 5007线的位置确定）的预期位置的速度偏移、线宽（FWHM，已校正光谱分辨率）和0.5 arcsec孔径内的线通量，(6)、(7)和(8)：分别与(3)、(4)和(5)相同，但在1.5 arcsec孔径内。引用的误差表示1 \sigma不确定性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Maps showing the variation in the centroid (left panels), width (FWHM, middle panels) and flux (right panel) of the H 2 rotational transitions, S(2) (top panels) and S(7) (bottom panels) as examples. The maps showcase the presence of two tidal tails in the central region of IR20551 - one towards the NE and other towards the SE. S(7), a higher excitation line, is covered in the lower channels of MRS, which have a smaller field-of-view. Therefore, the tidal tail towards the NE of the nucleus, seen in S(2), is not visible. The black star in all plots mark the location of the nucleus (putative AGN). See Sect. 4.2 for more details about these maps.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：显示H_{2}转动跃迁S(2)（顶部面板）和S(7)（底部面板）的质心（左面板）、宽度（FWHM，中间面板）和通量（右面板）变化的图。这些图展示了IR20551中心区域存在两条潮汐尾——一条朝向东北，另一条朝向东南。S(7)是一条更高激发线，覆盖在MRS的较低通道中，这些通道的视场较小。因此，在S(2)中看到的朝向核区东北的潮汐尾不可见。所有图中的黑色星标记了核区（假定AGN）的位置。有关这些图的更多详细信息，请参见第4.2节。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The grey curve in the top panel shows the extracted CO(2-1) spectra from the ALMA data cube (radius of aperture, R = 1.5 arcsec) and the blue curve overlaid shows the total multi-Gaussian model. The dashed red curves show the individual Gaussians. The vertical line shows the expected location of CO(2-1) line based on the redshift of IR20551. The bottom panel shows the residuals from the fit. The \(w_{80}\) parameter for the total Gaussian fit is \(\sim\) 200 km s -1 , which does not suggest the presence of a fast moving cold molecular gas outflow in IR20551.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：顶部面板中的灰色曲线显示了从ALMA数据立方体（孔径半径，R = 1.5 arcsec）提取的CO(2-1)光谱，叠加的蓝色曲线显示了总的多高斯模型。红色虚线曲线显示了各个高斯分量。垂直线显示了基于IR20551红移的CO(2-1)线的预期位置。底部面板显示了拟合的残差。总高斯拟合的w_{80}参数为~200 km s^{-1}，这并不表明IR20551中存在快速移动的冷分子气体外流。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: CO(2-1) maps of IR20551: \(v_{50}\) which is equivalent of a centroid map is shown in the left panel, the middle panel shows the \(w_{80}\) map (equivalent of a FWHM map) and the right panel shows the flux map. Non-parametric measurements are shown here due to the double Gaussian fitting in CO(2-1) lines. The black star in the centre of the images mark the putative AGN location. The centroid, width and morphology mirror the warm molecular gas transitions shown in Fig. 5 , suggesting that the two molecular gas phases show similar morphological and kinematic properties.

title: Magnetic properties of the Abell 3391-3395 system revealed using wide-field MeerKAT polarimetry
summary: Magnetic fields in cluster outskirts and the intercluster medium are poorly constrained because diffuse synchrotron emission is hard to detect at low surface brightness. Faraday rotation measures (RMs) of polarized background sources can probe foreground large-scale structure. The nearby interacting Abell 3391-3395 system hosts a well-established X-ray bridge, making it an excellent target for studying magnetization in the intercluster environment. We characterize the magnetized environment of Abell 3391/95 and its surroundings by constructing a dense RM grid from wide-field polarimetry. We observed Abell 3391/95 with MeerKAT in full polarization using a three-pointing mosaic. The data were calibrated with direction-independent and direction-dependent techniques and imaged using visibility-plane mosaicing for a large field of view at high sensitivity. Using Faraday synthesis, we formed Faraday cubes and measured RMs for polarized background sources. We defined on- and off-target regions using contours from a wavelet-filtered eROSITA image. We identified 434 polarized sources within the field, with a polarized source density ranging from about 30 sources per square degree in the outer regions to about 110 sources per square degree in the central field, and a field-averaged density of 73 sources per square degree. The clusters show a statistically significant enhancement of RM scatter relative to the off-target region. In contrast, the bridge shows comparatively low RM scatter, while an RM structure-function analysis on matched angular scales yields a tentative indication of larger RM differences in the bridge than off-target. Combined with low per-source depolarization, this suggests a bridge magnetic field relatively ordered on ~10 kpc scales, but less ordered on larger scales. The non-detection of diffuse synchrotron emission in the bridge yields improved upper limits on the emissivity.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用MeerKAT望远镜对Abell 3391-3395星系团系统进行偏振观测，通过法拉第旋转测量分析星系团间介质中的磁场特性，发现星系团区域RM散射增强，而星系团间桥梁区域RM散射较低但存在较大尺度无序性。
AI.motivation: 星系团外围和星系团间介质的磁场特性难以约束，因为弥散同步辐射在低表面亮度下难以探测。法拉第旋转测量可以探测前景大尺度结构的磁化环境。邻近相互作用的Abell 3391-3395系统具有明确的X射线桥梁，是研究星系团间环境磁化的理想目标。
AI.method: 使用MeerKAT望远镜对Abell 3391/95进行三点拼接的全偏振观测，采用方向无关和方向相关的校准技术，通过可见度平面拼接成像获得大视场高灵敏度数据。利用法拉第合成形成法拉第立方体并测量偏振背景源的法拉第旋转量，基于小波滤波的eROSITA图像轮廓定义目标和非目标区域。
AI.result: 在视场内识别了434个偏振源，偏振源密度从外围区域的约30个/平方度到中心区域的约110个/平方度，平均密度为73个/平方度。星系团区域相对于非目标区域显示出统计显著的RM散射增强，而桥梁区域RM散射相对较低。RM结构函数分析显示桥梁区域在匹配角尺度上存在比非目标区域更大的RM差异，结合低单源退偏振，表明桥梁磁场在约10 kpc尺度上相对有序，但在更大尺度上无序性更强。桥梁区域未探测到弥散同步辐射，改进了发射率上限。
AI.conclusion: Abell 3391-3395星系团间桥梁的磁场特性表现为小尺度有序但大尺度无序的特征，这为理解星系团间介质的磁化环境提供了重要观测约束，同时未探测到的弥散同步辐射为相关理论模型设定了改进的上限。

title: Galaxies at z > 10: ΛCDM predicts increased Star Formation Efficiency
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, 1 table. Submitted to ApJL
summary: We show that the rest-frame UV statistics and global properties of galaxies at 7 <= z <= 14 are naturally reproduced within the standard ΛCDM framework when galaxy formation is modeled with UniverseMachine applied to the high-resolution Uchuu N-body simulation. Our model matches the UV luminosity functions over five magnitudes and reproduces the evolution of the UV (and inferred star formation rate) density once internal dust attenuation is included. Comparisons with spectroscopically confirmed JWST/HST galaxies show good agreement with the stellar mass-SFR and stellar mass-UV luminosity relations. In contrast, earlier claims of insufficient stellar masses at z=8 are inconsistent with our model and are likely driven by systematic uncertainties, including AGN contamination, dust attenuation, and the lack of JWST/MIRI constraints. A key prediction is that the star-formation efficiency increases with redshift at fixed halo mass, reaching 2-3 percent of baryons converted into stars by z=10-12. These results demonstrate that current JWST observations of early galaxy populations can be explained within the ΛCDM framework.

AI.tldr: 该研究证明，在标准ΛCDM宇宙学框架下，通过UniverseMachine模型结合高分辨率Uchuu模拟，可以自然解释JWST观测到的z=7-14星系UV统计特性和全局性质，反驳了早期关于星系质量不足的结论。
AI.motivation: 针对JWST观测到的早期星系（z=7-14）UV统计特性和全球性质，以及早期研究中声称在z=8时星系质量不足的问题，本研究旨在验证标准ΛCDM宇宙学框架是否能够解释这些观测数据。
AI.method: 使用UniverseMachine星系形成模型应用于高分辨率Uchuu N体模拟，考虑了内部尘埃衰减效应，并与JWST/HST光谱确认的星系观测数据进行对比分析。
AI.result: 模型成功匹配了五个星等范围内的UV光度函数，再现了UV密度演化；与观测数据在恒星质量-恒星形成率关系和恒星质量-UV光度关系上表现出良好一致性；预测恒星形成效率随红移增加，在z=10-12时达到重子物质的2-3%。
AI.conclusion: 当前JWST对早期星系的观测完全可以在标准ΛCDM框架内得到解释，早期关于星系质量不足的结论可能是由AGN污染、尘埃衰减和缺乏MIRI约束等系统不确定性导致的。

title: Breaking the UV Luminosity Function Degeneracy:Self-Interacting Dark Matter Constraints from Reionization Topology
summary: Self-interacting dark matter (SIDM) is the leading framework resolving small-scale cold dark matter (CDM) crises, yet high-redshift SIDM constraints are fundamentally limited by degeneracies between dark matter microphysics and galaxy formation astrophysics. We demonstrate that the UV luminosity function alone cannot constrain SIDM: star formation suppression from SIDM halo core formation is fully absorbed by modest adjustments to standard astrophysical parameters. We show that 21 cm reionization topology breaks this degeneracy completely, providing a nuisance-immune probe: the SIDM-enhanced duty cycle of ionizing photon escape leaves a morphological signature fully independent of star formation efficiency. Combining JWST UVLF measurements with SKA1-Low forecasts, constant-cross-section SIDM with $σ/m \gtrsim 1$--$2\ \mathrm{cm^2/g}$ is either excluded or detectable across all physically motivated star formation coupling strengths. Our results establish a robust new avenue to probe dark matter microphysics in the early Universe.

title: Investigation of Hourglass-shaped Magnetic fields in the G35.20-0.74 Star-Forming Complex
summary: To investigate the role of magnetic fields toward the G35N and G35S sub-regions in the G35.20-0.74 star-forming complex, we utilized multi-wavelength polarimetric observations from the SOFIA/HAWC+ at 154 $μ$m and ACT at 220 GHz/1.3 mm. The ACT 220 GHz polarization data (resolution $\sim$1$'$) show an hourglass-shaped plane-of-sky magnetic field morphologies toward both the sub-regions, although with distinct symmetry axes. SOFIA/HAWC+ 154 $μ$m data (resolution $\sim$13.6$''$) confirm an hourglass morphology in G35N, whereas G35S displays a different magnetic field configuration compared to the ACT observations. An hourglass morphology identified at clump scales ($\sim$pc) toward G35N is consistent with the previously reported B-field morphology at core scales ($\sim$0.05 pc), supporting the scenario of a magnetically regulated collapse. Using the SOFIA/HAWC+ data, we estimate magnetic field strengths of $\sim$600 $\pm$ 200 $μ$G in G35N and $\sim$850 $\pm$ 310 $μ$G in G35S. Energy balance analysis suggests that gravity and magnetic fields contribute comparably in G35N, while in G35S the gas dynamics are dominated by magnetic field, followed by gravity and turbulence. The higher field strength in G35S likely results from compression by the expanding HII region, highlighting the impact of stellar feedback. The derived magnetic field strengths and corresponding magnetic energies should be treated as upper limits due to unresolved beam-scale correlations and the limited fitting range of the polarization angle structure function. Overall, our results show that magnetic fields decisively regulate star formation, with G35N shaped by magnetically controlled collapse and G35S being strongly influenced by stellar feedback.

The contour levels are 1, 2, 4, 6, 7, 9, 11, and 13 mJy beam -1 . The white dashed circles show the positions of the four HFS candidates detected toward the G35 cloud. The scale bar corresponding to 5 pc at a distance of 2.19 kpc is shown.
figures.caption_zh: 图1: a) Spitzer /IRAC 8.0 \(\mu\) m图像（采用反双曲正弦尺度），叠加了ATLASGAL在870 \(\mu\) m处的团块位置（c1-c10）（见红色菱形）。绿色等高线表示SMGPS 1.3 GHz连续谱发射。等高线水平为1、17、34和50 mJy beam -1 。白色点划线等高线显示GRS 13 CO (1–0)积分强度（[30, 40] km s -1 ），水平为13 K km s -1 。b) 该面板显示unWISE 12 \(\mu\) m图像（采用反双曲正弦尺度），叠加了ATLASGAL 870 \(\mu\) m等高线（红色）。等高线水平为1、2、4、6、7、9、11和13 mJy beam -1 。白色虚线圆圈显示了在G35云中探测到的四个HFS候选体的位置。比例尺对应于2.19 kpc距离处的5 pc。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The panels show the two-color composite images (red: unWISE 12.0 \(\mu\) m; turqoise: Spitzer 8.0 \(\mu\) m) of the HFS candidates detected toward the G35 cloud (see dashed circles in Figure 1 b). The white dotted curves/lines highlights the visually identified filaments. The diamonds show the locations of the ATLASGAL clumps. The scale bar corresponding to 1 pc at a distance of 2.19 kpc is shown in each panel .
figures.caption_zh: 图2: 这些面板显示了在G35云中探测到的HFS候选体的双色合成图像（红色：unWISE 12.0 \(\mu\) m；青绿色：Spitzer 8.0 \(\mu\) m）（见图1 b中的虚线圆圈）。白色虚线曲线/线条突出显示了视觉识别的纤维结构。菱形显示了ATLASGAL团块的位置。每个面板中显示了对应于2.19 kpc距离处1 pc的比例尺。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: a) Overlay of segments (in cyan) showing the B-field orientations inferred using the Planck 353 GHz polarization data (resolution \(\sim\) 5 ′ ) on the unWISE 12.0 \(\mu\) m map (in the inverse hyperbolic sine scale). b) unWISE 12.0 \(\mu\) m image (in the inverse hyperbolic sine scale) overlaid with the segments displaying the B-field orientations from the ACT 220 GHz data (resolution \(\sim\) 1 ′ ). The cyan and magenta segments represent polarization vectors with \(p/\sigma_{p} 4 and 3 c respectively. c) Same as Figure 3 b, but for the FOV indicated by the yellow box. The magenta curves highlight the hourglass-like shape of the B-fields. For display purposes, B-field segments are plotted at the pixel scale, i.e., oversampled relative to the beam resolution. d) Herschel \(N(H_{2})\) map from PPMAP toward the area shown by yellow box in Figure 3 b overlaid with the \(N(H_{2})\) contour level at 9.5 \(\times\) 10 21 cm -2 . The diamonds (in red) in both panels highlight the location of the ATLASGAL clumps. The polarization data beam size is indicated by a circle placed in the bottom-left corner of the image. The scale bar derived at a distance of 2.19 kpc is shown in each panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图3: a) 在unWISE 12.0 \(\mu\) m图像（采用反双曲正弦尺度）上叠加了使用Planck 353 GHz偏振数据（分辨率\(\sim\) 5 ′ ）推断出的B场方向线段（青色）。b) unWISE 12.0 \(\mu\) m图像（采用反双曲正弦尺度）叠加了显示来自ACT 220 GHz数据（分辨率\(\sim\) 1 ′ ）的B场方向线段。青色和品红色线段分别表示具有\(p/\sigma_{p} 4和3 c的偏振矢量。c) 与图3 b相同，但视场由黄色方框指示。品红色曲线突出了B场的沙漏状形状。为显示目的，B场线段以像素尺度绘制，即相对于波束分辨率过采样。d) 来自PPMAP的Herschel \(N(H_{2})\) 图，朝向图3 b中黄色方框所示的区域，叠加了\(N(H_{2})\) 等高线，水平为9.5 \(\times\) 10 21 cm -2 。两个面板中的菱形（红色）突出显示了ATLASGAL团块的位置。偏振数据波束尺寸由图像左下角的圆圈指示。每个面板中显示了在2.19 kpc距离处推导出的比例尺。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: a) B-field segments (in red) inferred from the SOFIA/HAWC+ 154 \(\mu\) m data overlaid on the three-color composite image (red: 12.0 \(\mu\) m, green: 8.0 \(\mu\) m, blue: 5.8 \(\mu\) m). The length of the segments is proportional to the degree of polarization. A reference vector corresponding to 15 \(\%\) polarization is shown in the bottom-left corner of the panel. b) The panel is the same as Figure 4 a, except that the segment lengths are kept constant. The yelow dot-dashed box displays the field shown in figure 5 a. The white dashed box highlights the G35S region. The grey contours represent the SOFIA/HAWC+ 154 \(\mu\) m continuum emission. The contour levels are 1, 3.8, 6.5, 9.3, and 12 Jy beam -1 . The diamonds show the locations of the ATLASGAL clumps. In each panel, the scale bar corresponding to 1 pc at a distance of 2.19 kpc is shown.
figures.caption_zh: 图4: a) 从SOFIA/HAWC+ 154 \(\mu\) m数据推断出的B场线段（红色）叠加在三色合成图像上（红色：12.0 \(\mu\) m，绿色：8.0 \(\mu\) m，蓝色：5.8 \(\mu\) m）。线段的长度与偏振度成正比。面板左下角显示了对应于15 \(\%\) 偏振的参考矢量。b) 该面板与图4 a相同，只是线段长度保持恒定。黄色点划线方框显示了图5 a中所示的场。白色虚线方框突出显示了G35S区域。灰色等高线代表SOFIA/HAWC+ 154 \(\mu\) m连续谱发射。等高线水平为1、3.8、6.5、9.3和12 Jy beam -1 。菱形显示了ATLASGAL团块的位置。每个面板中显示了对应于2.19 kpc距离处1 pc的比例尺。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: a) Spitzer 8.0 \(\mu\) m image of HFS-1/G35N overlaid with the streamlines showing the B-field directions estimated using the SOFIA/HAWC+ 154 \(\mu\) m polarization data. The dotted curves highlight the hourglass-like structure of the B-fields. The scale bar is the same as shown in Figure 4 a. b) The panel depicts the histogram of B-field position angles from the SOFIA/HAWC+ 154 \(\mu\) m toward the G35N (in orange), and G35S (in blue).
figures.caption_zh: 图5: a) HFS-1/G35N的Spitzer 8.0 \(\mu\) m图像，叠加了使用SOFIA/HAWC+ 154 \(\mu\) m偏振数据估计的B场方向流线。虚线曲线突出了B场的沙漏状结构。比例尺与图4 a中所示相同。b) 该面板描绘了来自SOFIA/HAWC+ 154 \(\mu\) m的B场位置角直方图，朝向G35N（橙色）和G35S（蓝色）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: a) The panel shows the GRS 13 CO(1–0) moment-2 map toward an area shown in Figure 4 a.b) The polarization dispersion ( \(\delta\theta\) ) map toward the G35 cloud using 9 \(\times\) 9 pixels sliding box. c) \(\delta\theta\) map toward G35 cloud using 15 \(\times\) 15 pixel sliding box. The dashed contours represent the ATLASGAL 870 \(\mu\) m continuum emission. The contour levels are 1, 3.8, 6.5, 9.3, and 12 Jy beam -1 . The scale bar is the same as shown in Figure 4 a.
figures.caption_zh: 图6: a) 该面板显示了朝向图4 a所示区域的GRS 13 CO(1–0)矩-2图。b) 使用9 \(\times\) 9像素滑动窗口得到的朝向G35云的偏振色散（\(\delta\theta\) ）图。c) 使用15 \(\times\) 15像素滑动窗口得到的朝向G35云的\(\delta\theta\) 图。虚线等高线代表ATLASGAL 870 \(\mu\) m连续谱发射。等高线水平为1、3.8、6.5、9.3和12 Jy beam -1 。比例尺与图4 a中所示相同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Panels (a) and (b) present the structure function ( \(D^{1/2}_{\theta}(\ell)\) ) for the G35N and G35S sub-regions of the cloud. The red-dashed line shows the linear fit of Equation 7 , while the grey vertical dashed lines mark the lower and upper limits used for the fit.
figures.caption_zh: 图7: 面板(a)和(b)分别展示了G35N和G35S云子区域的结构函数（\(D^{1/2}_{\theta}(\ell)\) ）。红色虚线显示了方程7的线性拟合，而灰色垂直虚线标记了用于拟合的下限和上限。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: a) Spitzer 8.0 \(\mu\) m image (in the inverse hyperbolic sine scale and re-gridded to same pixel scale as the ACT 220 GHz data) overlaid with B-field orientations from the SOFIA/HAWC+ 154 \(\mu\) m (in red) and ACT 220 GHz (in cyan). b) Same as Figure 8 a, the back ground image is the ACT 220 GHz continuum map. The cyan and green segments represent polarization vectors with \(p/\sigma_{p}<3\) and \(p/\sigma_{p}\geq 3\) , respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图8: a) Spitzer 8.0 \(\mu\) m图像（采用反双曲正弦尺度并重新网格化至与ACT 220 GHz数据相同的像素尺度），叠加了来自SOFIA/HAWC+ 154 \(\mu\) m（红色）和ACT 220 GHz（青色）的B场方向。b) 与图8 a相同，背景图像是ACT 220 GHz连续谱图。青色和绿色线段分别表示具有\(p/\sigma_{p}<3\) 和\(p/\sigma_{p}\geq 3\) 的偏振矢量。
